_comment: Build configuration tracker for gozik-yt-music. Auto-updated by package.sh.

project.name: gozik-yt-music-server
project.description: YouTube Music gRPC plugin server for the gozik desktop player

binary.name: gozik-yt-music-server
binary.note: Self-contained directory produced by PyInstaller. Bundles the Python interpreter, bytecode, extension modules, and data files without translating Python to C.

pyinstaller_flags_explained.--onedir: Produces an application directory instead of a single file. Faster startup and easier debugging than --onefile.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--hidden-import=ytmusicapi / grpc / yt_d: Dynamic mixin loading and runtime __import__ strings cannot be detected by static analysis.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--collect-all=PACKAGE: Recursively copies every submodule and package data file into the bundle.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--add-data=generated:generated: Project protobuf stubs are included as a package directory.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--add-data=certifi/cacert.pem:certifi: Mozilla CA bundle required for HTTPS by ytmusicapi and yt-dlp.
Excludes GUI toolkit, test frameworks, and build-time tools to reduce bundle size.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--noconfirm: Suppresses interactive prompts, required for CI/automated builds.
pyinstaller_flags_explained.--clean: Removes PyInstaller's temporary build/ directory before building.

data_files.description: Mozilla CA certificate bundle; required for HTTPS by ytmusicapi and yt-dlp
Compiled protobuf stubs for music_provider and provider_link services

build_requirements.upx: NOT used — UPX triggers AV false positives and is unnecessary for onedir bundles
